characters.name: 5-Volt
characters.description: 5-Voltis9-Volt's mother inWarioWare series, making her first appearance inWarioWare: Twisted!, although she was mentioned inWarioWare, Inc.: Mega Microgame$!. She was not fully seen untilGame & Wario. 5-Volt was mentioned in the game, although her name was not there. Her son,9-Volt, mentions in his diary that she loved the Game-and-Watch game device he gave her. It was mentioned that her birthday is on March 13. 5-Volt makes her first appearance inWarioWare Twisted!. After completing 9-Volt's microgame sets, she bursts into his room and yells at him that it is past his bedtime and we see her from the knees down. She later checks to see if he is sleeping for real and closes the door. It is later revealed 9-Volt is still playing on hisGame Boy Advance SP, but a few seconds later, she opened the door and saw him playing hisGame Boy Advance SP, which she demands he put away. She appears as a silhouette in the doorway.

She appears as a silhouette in the doorway.

characters.name: 9-Volt
characters.description: 9-Voltis a major character in theWarioWareseries, first appearing inWarioWare, Inc.: Mega Microgame$!. 9-Volt is an elementary school child with round eyes with thick black eyebrows, and a button nose. 9-Volt has light-brown hair, most of which is covered by a yellow construction helmet on his head, but his hair is visibly framed with star-like whispies. In his earlier appearances, 9-Volt had small pupils, but sinceWarioWare Gold, they were made larger and given a brown color. In said game, 9-Volt's hair was also made a bit larger. In the title screen of theGamerstage inGame & Wario, 9-Volt is shown without his helmet for the first time, although his hair is red. InWarioWare: Get It Together!, 9-Volt's full set of hair is shown again, now with a shaggy look and being colored brown like in his other appearances. 9-Volt's helmet has a light green, transparent visor, an orange globe on the left and right sides each, and built-in gray headphones. 9-Volt's other clothing items include a red short-sleeved shirt with a light-green triangular collar, light green puffy pants, red gloves, and red boots. 9-Volt's shirt has a front pocket bearing a yellow "V," short for voltage. He either wears fingerless or fingered gloves, depending on the appearance. 9-Volt loves retro gaming, just like his friend 18-Volt, and the two of them often have gaming sessions together, such as after school. 9-Volt has video game addiction, and even tries to secretively play games past his bedtime when his mother,5-Volt, is not looking. Prior toWarioWare Gold, 9-Volt had more robotic-like voices, but sinceWarioWare Gold, he has been given a human voice.
characters.personality_section: 9-Volt loves retro gaming, just like his friend 18-Volt, and the two of them often have gaming sessions together, such as after school. 9-Volt has video game addiction, and even tries to secretively play games past his bedtime when his mother,5-Volt, is not looking. Prior toWarioWare Gold, 9-Volt had more robotic-like voices, but sinceWarioWare Gold, he has been given a human voice.

Coz(younger brother)Willy(younger brother) A. Cozis a tennis player in theMario Tennisseries. He is the older brother ofB. CozandWilly. A. Coz first appears inMario Tennisfor theGame Boy Color. InMario Tennisfor the Game Boy Color, A. Coz is an unlockable character of the Tricky type. In doubles, he is partnered with his brother, B. Coz. A. Coz can be unlocked by winning against him in Mario Tour in Singles or Doubles inIsland Open.

characters.name: Abominable Snowkoopa
characters.description: Abominable SnowkoopaThe Abominable Snowkoopa chasing after thepenguinsofAntarcticaChronological informationTV show appearancesThe Adventures of Super Mario Bros. 3Episode appearances"7 Continents for 7 Koopas"Personal informationSpeciesSnowmanTheAbominable Snowkoopais a monstrous snowman created byBig Mouth Koopain theThe Adventures of Super Mario Bros. 3episode "7 Continents for 7 Koopas." It was created by him to take overAntarcticaand terrorize thepenguinsliving there. It essentially has the appearance of a regular snowman, complete with a top hat and a scarf, which has a pattern consisting of blue and green squares. Abominable Snowkoopa's name is a pun on the "abominable snowman," but with "Koopa" replacing the suffix "-man."

characters.name: Ackpow
characters.description: Ackpowsare a species inSuper Paper Mario. They are sphinx-hat wearing servants that work forMimi. They appear insideMerlee's Mansionin Chapter 2-3. They are responsible for making sure all of the other servants are working and paying themRubeesonce they finish. Also, ifPeachflies towards the door above the level start, a Question Block containing aMushroomwill be found, with an Ackpow watching it. WheneverMarioor Peach strike the Question Block, they have to pay ten Rubees to the Ackpow. According toTippi, they act as though they are important, but they are actually in debt toMimijust like the rest of the servants. characters.name: Admiral Bobbery
characters.description: Admiral BobberyChronological informationFirst appearancePaper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door(2004)Latest appearanceSuper Paper Mario(2007) (cameo)Game appearancesPaper Mario: The Thousand-Year DoorSuper Paper MarioPersonal informationGenderMaleHomelandRogueportSpeciesBob-ombConnectionsFamilyScarlette(deceased wife) Admiral Bobbery, or justBobbery, is an elderlyBob-ombinPaper Mario: The Thousand-Year DoorandMario's sixth partner. He used to be a proud sailor who loved the sea, but loved his wifeScarletteeven more. While he was out at sea, Scarlette became very ill and died shortly after he returned from his voyage. The grief and nightmares caused by her loss made him lose the desire to ever sail again.

characters.name: Advisor
characters.description: AdvisorAn Advisor, as it appears in the overworld.Chronological informationFirst appearanceMario & Luigi: Superstar Saga(2003)Game appearancesMario & Luigi: Superstar Saga(2003)Personal informationHomelandBeanbean KingdomRaceBeanish Advisors(prototype name,Peas) characters that appear inMario & Luigi: Superstar Saga. The Advisors are the Beanish servants that worship the rule ofQueen Bean, and are theBeanbean Kingdomequivalents ofMushroom Retainers. WhenCacklettaattempted to usurp Queen Bean's rule, all the Advisors of the castle were imprisoned in the sewer system of the castle. They were saved and freed byMarioandLuigi, who defeated thepossessedQueen Bean.

It guards theTopaz Passage. Aerodent himself is a grey mouse. He hides in a brown balloon that resembles a bear, with a necklace of blue gems.

characters.name: Akiki
characters.description: AkikiChronological informationFirst appearanceMario Party Advance(2005)Game appearancesMario Party AdvancePersonal informationGenderFemaleHomelandJungle Area,Shroom CitySpeciesUkikiConnectionsFamilyUkiki(uncle)Akikiis aUkikicharacter who appears inMario Party Advance. She is the tomboyish niece ofUkiki, the mayor of theJungle AreainShroom City. Akiki has come under the belief that her uncle was kidnapped and requested that the player andShroomlockgo search for him. She left a secret message reading "bIg teAM cAT THElf bLAKE." When looking only at the capital letters, it spells "I am at the lake", referring toLoch Dorrie. Once the player has found Ukiki, he revealed that he faked his kidnapping to play a joke on Akiki.

characters.name: Albert Einstein
characters.description: Albert EinsteinMario's Time Machine (NES) spriteChronological informationFirst appearanceMario's Time Machine(Nintendo Entertainment System) (1994)TV show appearancesThe Super Mario Bros. Super Show!Episode appearances"9001: A Mario Odyssey"Personal informationGenderMaleOccupationsScientistSpeciesHumanRaceJewishBehind the scenesCurrentEnglishvoice actorEd Metzger Albert Einsteinwas a German scientist in real life who is famous for his discoveries ofmodern physics, especially the formula formass-energy equivalence, E=mc^2. He first appeared in theThe Super Mario Bros. Super Show!live-action segment "9001: A Mario Odyssey" and later returned inMario's Time Machinefor theNintendo Entertainment System. Einstein'sPhysics Equation, which holds his famousE=mc2, is one of the items thatBowserhad stolen. After retrieving the item,Mariohas to time travel back to the year 1905 and return the Physics Equation to Einstein.

characters.name: Albino Dino
characters.description: Albino Dinosare beta enemies and regular characters found inPaper Mario. Three do appear as stable statues in theCrystal Palaceand as creatures who can be talked to and flip in the palace when their corresponding statues are moved into a different position whenMariohas to solve a puzzle involving them. When completed, the allow Mario to move on. They are also white variations ofDino Rhinos. They are found in the room right next to theCrystal King's lair.

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: AlexMario Tennis: Power Tour artworkChronological informationFirst appearanceMario Tennis(Game Boy Color) (2000)Latest appearanceMario Tennis: Power Tour(2005)Game appearancesMario Tennis(Game Boy Color)Mario Tennis: Power TourPersonal informationGenderMaleStatusAliveOccupationsTennis playerHead coachSpeciesHumanCharacter traitsAlignmentGoodBehind the scenesCreatorCamelotAlexis a character who debuts in theGame Boy Colorversion ofMario Tennis. His partner isHarry. He later reappears inMario Tennis: Power Touras a coach at theRoyal Tennis Academy. Alex fromMario Tennisfor the Game Boy Color Everyone at theRoyal Tennis Academyis surprised at Alex's very fast rise in the club ranks by getting into the varsity team by beating the fourth placedBob, which he does days after being instated he beatsEmilyon the way to the final againstFactory'sA. Cozand wins easily. After hearing of the newest tennis star,Princess Peachinvites Alex for a match againstMario. In theNintendo 64version ofMario Tennis, he is a transferred character and can be played in this version, though not in itsVirtual Consoleport.

characters.name: Alex (Minecraft)
characters.description: AlexAlex in MinecraftChronological informationFirst appearanceMinecraft(2014 Update)Game appearancesSuper Smash Bros. UltimatePersonal informationGenderFemaleHomelandThe overworldSpeciesHumanConnectionsFriendsSteveEnemiesZombieEndermanBehind the scenesCreatorMojangAlexis one of the main playable characters ofMinecraft. She is a female version ofSteveadded in 2014.  On October 1, 2020, Steve was revealed to be the fighter included in Challenger Pack 7, with more information to be revealed prior to Minecraft Live 2020. They are currently the fifth third-party DLC character in the game. Their appearance and animations appear identical to their iteration in Minecraft, with the ability to place blocks, mine for materials, and use items from within the game. Their Final Smash is a giant piston which smashes players into a stronghold filled with TNT, with Creepers detonating the explosives. Alex is one of Steve's alternate costumes, alongsideZombieandEnderman.

characters.name: Ali Mustafa
characters.description: Ali MustafaChronological informationFirst comic appearance"Mario's Picross"Comic appearancesClub NintendoPersonal informationGenderMaleOccupationsShopkeeperSpeciesHumanCharacter traitsAlignmentNeutralAli Mustafais an Egyptian tie salesman who made a one-time appearance in theClub Nintendocomic "Mario's Picross." In the comic,Mariois stranded and dehydrated from being in the desert. Along the way, Mario meets Ali Mustafa, who tries to sell him ties, claiming it is Egypt's best. Mario gets infuriated, as he wants a drink, so he shoos away Ali Mustafa. Mario later finds out that a cocktail bar requires him to wear a tie in order to enter. Ali Mustafa has a short curled mustache. He wears an orange robe and a teal-colored turban with a red, circular gemstone on the front, above which is a red, a yellow, and a green feather. He wears light yellow sandals.

characters.name: Alien Bunny
characters.description: Alien BunnyAlien Bunny inWarioWare Twisted.Chronological informationFirst appearanceWarioWare, Inc.: Mega Microgame$!(2003)Latest appearanceWarioWare Gold(2018)Personal informationStatusAliveOccupationsOrbulon's petsSpeciesRabbit, alienConnectionsAffiliationOrbuonOwnersOrbulon(master)Character traitsAlignmentNeutral Alien Bunnies, originally known asSpace Hares, are a recurring alien species in theWarioWare series. They originally appear as the life counter forOrbulon's games inWarioWare, Inc.: Mega Microgame$!Every time the player loses one of their lives, an Alien Bunny gets sucked into a nameless void. Regaining a life brings one back from said void. Their spaceship appears in theDribble and Spitzmicrogame,Space Escape.

characters.name: Allie
characters.description: AllieChronological informationFirst appearanceMario Tennis(Game Boy Color) (2000)Personal informationGenderMaleOccupationsTennis playerSpeciesHuman Allieis a tennis player and a playable character inMario Tennisfor theGame Boy Color. His partner in Senior doubles isFay.

characters.name: Alligator Dundee (character)
characters.description: Alligator DundeeChronological informationTV show appearancesThe Super Mario Bros. Super Show!(live-action)Episode appearances"Alligator Dundee"Personal informationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAlligator Dundeeis a one-time character who appears in the titularThe Super Mario Bros. Super Show!live-action segment "Alligator Dundee." He is a parody ofMichael "Crocodile" DundeeofCrocodile Dundee. In "Alligator Dundee," he chases a monster intoMario Brothers Plumbing, and they decide to help him capture it. Unbeknownst to Alligator Dundee, the monster turns out to beMarioandLuigi's friend,Ratagator. Mario and Luigi stop him, and he apologizes, changes his name toRatagator Dungee, and decides to make a movie about his life.
